evidence.transcript: Hollywood The Cia And Ufos The History Bey
evidence.excerpt: So everyone went to my house, the same place where this party crasher crashed, right? And, uh, and my son was the, the guy that recorded Dave Grush on his first interview. During the time when we were getting ready to record that, I said, have you ever heard of John Harrington? And Grush said, oh, I know, I know John Harrington. I said, well, what, what, what do you know about him? He didn't want to talk about it. Okay. Now let's flash forward to 2025. Um, I'm not even, I don't think I'm even working with Coulthard anymore when this happened, or maybe, maybe I was, but he calls me and he says, I've been asked by Dave Grush to ask you to ask Brent if he can help us get John Harrington to Washington DC to potentially testify to the house oversight committee.
